incident: CHECK_FAREAST job failed with error no file found

analysis.summary: CHECK_FAREAST job failed due to missing input file
analysis.immediate_action: Restore the missing file from backup and re-run the job
analysis.escalate_to: Database team for verification of backup integrity
additional_steps: Review log files to identify when the file went missing
Verify that input file is being generated correctly by source system
analysis.prevention: Regularly monitor backup completeness and implement automated failover procedures
